posts.author: SteveHorwitz (Steve)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Hi

Client wants to know if there is anywhere in the roadmap, the ability to hide updates?

The use case is they have clients who access the board and add updates to tasks.

But as the tasks are also used internally they don’t want the client seeing internal communication between employees.

Is this possible?

What are you trying to achieve

The ability to hide updates
